findings.title: Overly Broad Token Scope
findings.description: The server requests a GitHub personal access token with repo scope (full read/write). Most use cases only require repo:read or specific sub-scopes, creating unnecessary privilege.
findings.recommendation: Document minimum required scopes and validate at startup that the provided token does not exceed them.

findings.title: No Rate Limit Handling
findings.description: The tool does not gracefully handle GitHub API rate-limit responses (HTTP 429), which can cause agents to enter busy-retry loops.
findings.recommendation: Implement exponential backoff and surface rate-limit state to the calling agent.
